homePage.mainTitle: Zeinte: Your Smart Ally to Pass Exams
homePage.subtitle: Transform your notes and past exams into a powerful study tool. Upload your documents, and our AI in Zeinte will analyze the content, predict key questions, and help you prepare like never before.
homePage.step1Description: PDFs, DOCXs, TXTs... all your study material is welcome in Zeinte.
homePage.step2Description: Let our AI in Zeinte identify crucial information and predict questions.
homePage.step3Description: Practice with questions, summaries, and detailed explanations in Zeinte.
homePage.choosePlanSubtitle: Start for free or unlock the full potential of Zeinte with our Pro Plan.
homePage.freeTrialDescription: Ideal for getting started and exploring Zeinte. During our Beta phase, enjoy more benefits!
homePage.proPlanFeature5: Save and manage your exams, courses, and summaries.
homePage.subscribeProAlert: Pro subscription functionality for Zeinte coming soon. Enjoy the Beta in the meantime!
homePage.revolutionizeStudyTitle: Ready to Revolutionize Your Study with Zeinte?
homePage.revolutionizeStudySubtitle: Stop guessing and start preparing with the artificial intelligence of Zeinte.
homePage.testimonialsTitle: What Our Users Say About Zeinte
homePage.testimonial1Quote: It has changed the way I prepare for my civil service exams. The question prediction is incredibly accurate and saves me a ton of time.
homePage.testimonial2Quote: As a university student, it helps me focus on what's truly important in my notes. The AI summaries are a lifesaver.
homePage.testimonial3Quote: I used to spend hours trying to guess what might be on the exam. Now, I get a clear idea in minutes. Highly recommended!
homePage.testimonial4Quote: For preparing for the MIR (medical residency exam), every minute counts. This tool gives me a direct focus on the most likely topics and their possible questions.
homePage.testimonial5Quote: Studying for IT certifications is dense. Being able to upload manuals and get relevant multiple-choice questions is a huge advantage.
homePage.testimonial6Quote: Even for reviewing high school concepts before university, it's useful. It helps me understand better and not get lost in the details.

features.uploadDocsShort: Upload exams, syllabi, and notes (PDF, DOCX, TXT) to Zeinte.
features.uploadDocsLong: Drag and drop or select files from your device. Zeinte will process multiple formats to extract relevant information and prepare it for intelligent analysis.
features.deepAnalysisShort: Zeinte's AI identifies key themes and patterns from past exams.
features.deepAnalysisLong: Our artificial intelligence in Zeinte examines the content of your documents, identifying recurring themes, frequently asked questions, and the overall course structure. If it detects past exams, it analyzes their methodology and the relative importance of topics.
features.smartPredictionShort: Zeinte generates multiple-choice questions that might appear on your exam.
features.smartPredictionLong: Based on exhaustive analysis, Zeinte predicts possible exam questions. These questions are designed to mimic the style, difficulty, and format of real tests, giving you a unique advantage.
features.smartSummaryShort: Turn long texts into clear and concise summaries to study better.
features.smartSummaryLong: Tired of reading endless documents? Upload them and let our AI create a structured, easy-to-digest summary with key points and thematic sections.
features.customCourseShort: Organize your study with a syllabus and content generated by AI.
features.customCourseLong: Don't know where to start? Tell the AI what you want to learn, and it will generate a complete study plan for you, with modules and detailed content for each topic.
features.interactiveStudyShort: View questions, answer, and get instant feedback in Zeinte.
features.interactiveStudyLong: Study efficiently with an interface designed for learning in Zeinte. Answer questions, check your correct and incorrect answers, and access detailed explanations to reinforce your knowledge.
features.customConfigShort: Tailor exam generation in Zeinte to your needs (number of questions).
features.customConfigLong: Adjust the default number of multiple-choice questions you want generated in Zeinte. These values will be used unless you change them at the time of generation.
features.studyCommunityShort: Explore forums and learn from others in the Zeinte community.
features.studyCommunityLong: Access our Zeinte community section where you'll find discussion forums with relevant topics for various competitive exams and studies. You'll be able to interact and share your own experiences.

tutorial.step1Content:
This quick tutorial will guide you through the key features to make the most of the app.
Let's get started!
tutorial.step2Content: Everything starts in 'Create Exam'. Upload your notes, syllabi, or old exams in PDF, DOCX, or even screenshots. The more information, the better the analysis!
tutorial.step3Content: Once uploaded, Zeinte's AI will analyze the content to identify key topics and generate multiple-choice exam questions. It's like having a private tutor who knows what's important.
tutorial.step4Content: In the results, you can answer the questions, see if you got them right, and get detailed explanations to reinforce concepts. Perfect for reviewing!
tutorial.step5Content: Every exam you generate is saved in your 'History'. This way, you can go back to study and review your previous analyses whenever you want.
tutorial.step6Content: In 'My Profile', you can set up your areas of interest. This will help us personalize your experience in the future.
tutorial.step7Content:
You've got the basics down. Explore, experiment, and transform the way you study. If you have any questions, look for the help icon.
Good luck with your exams!

legal.disclaimerText: Disclaimer: Zeinte is an AI-powered study tool. The predicted questions are suggestions and do not guarantee what will appear on an actual exam. Always study the complete syllabus.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is Zeinte and how does it work?
faq.a1: Zeinte is a study platform that uses AI to analyze your documents (notes, exams, syllabi) and predict possible exam questions, create summaries, and custom courses to help you study more effectively.
faq.a2: Zeinte offers a Free Plan with basic features and a Pro Plan with unlimited access to all functionalities. You can check the details on our pricing page.
faq.q3: What file types can I upload?
faq.a3: Currently, you can upload PDF, DOCX, TXT, PNG, JPG, and WEBP files. You can also use your device's camera to take photos of documents.
faq.a4: Yes, we take security very seriously. Your documents are processed securely and are only used to generate the analysis for you. Check our Privacy Policy for more details.
faq.q5: What happens if the AI predictions are not accurate?
faq.a5: Zeinte is a study support tool. The predictions are based on patterns and data, but they are not infallible. We recommend using them as a guide to focus your study, but not as a substitute for studying the full syllabus.
faq.a6: You can contact us via the live chat (the icon at the bottom right) or by sending an email to info@zeinte.com for any questions or issues.

supportForm.title: Help and Support
supportForm.description: Do you have any questions? Check our FAQ or contact us via live chat.

authContext.tooManyRequestsResendEmailError: You have requested to resend the verification email too many times. Please try again later.

verifyEmailPage.title: Verify Your Email
verifyEmailPage.description: A verification link has been sent to {{email}}. Please click the link in the email to activate your account.
verifyEmailPage.spamWarning: If you don't see the email, please check your spam or junk folder.
verifyEmailPage.loginAfterVerification: Once verified, you will be able to log in and access all features.
verifyEmailPage.notYetVerifiedDescription: We couldn't confirm your verification yet. Please check your email and click the link.

paymentPage.title: Complete Your Pro Plan Purchase
paymentPage.description: You are one step away from unlocking all of Zeinte's features.
paymentPage.afterPaymentInfo: After completing the payment, your account will be automatically updated to the Pro Plan. If you have any issues, please contact our support.

conditionalLayout.interestSetupDescription: To help you get the most out of Zeinte, please take a moment to set up your primary study interest in your profile.

writtenQuestionCard.cardDescription: Practice your writing and structuring skills.
writtenQuestionCard.uploadImageLabel: Upload an Image (e.g., a diagram or map)
writtenQuestionCard.analysisSoonDescription: AI analysis of written answers will be available in a future version. For now, you can use this space to practice!
